title: unify Stream + Meetings into /admin/live
description:
## Summary

Replaces separate `/admin/stream` and `/admin/meetings` pages with a single adaptive `/admin/live` cockpit. Layout shifts based on what's currently live: empty / stream / rooms / both.

**Bonus:** fixes the broken `/admin/meetings` on `web.korczewski.de` (and silently-broken state on mentolder) — root cause was tickets schema ownership drift (`postgres` owned tables that role `website` tried to ALTER during boot migration). Phase 0 corrected ownership on both shared-db instances.

## Phases (12, all green)

- **0**: Diagnose + fix korczewski crash (DB ownership drift on `tickets.*`)
- **1**: Sidebar consolidation, page skeleton, route redirects, detail-page move
- **2**: `LiveState` reducer + `/api/live/state` aggregator endpoint
- **3**: Launchpad (empty state)
- **4**: RoomsBoard + ActiveRoomCard + RoomDrawer
- **5**: BulkActionsBar + Brett/Poll/Transcription modals (extracted from old inline scripts)
- **6**: StreamCockpit + PublishControls + RecordingPanel + ConnectionIndicator
- **7**: AudiencePanel marker (StreamPlayer already host-mounts the audience widgets)
- **8**: PollOverlayPanel
- **9**: LiveStatusBar + LiveToasts
- **10**: ScheduleNudge (stretch)
- **11**: Cleanup
- **12**: Polling-driven LiveCockpit composition + final wiring

## Test plan

- [ ] `/admin/stream` → 301 → `/admin/live`
- [ ] `/admin/meetings` → 301 → `/admin/live`
- [ ] `/admin/meetings/<id>` → 301 → `/admin/live/sessions/<id>`
- [ ] Sidebar shows single "Live" entry (was Meetings + Stream)
- [ ] Empty state: Launchpad with start-buttons + Letzte Sessions
- [ ] Stream-only: full-width StreamCockpit
- [ ] Rooms-only: full-width RoomsBoard with bulk-actions
- [ ] Both: 2/3 stream + 1/3 rooms split
- [ ] Bulk Brett/Poll/Transcription work (use existing endpoints)
- [ ] LiveStatusBar shows ON AIR + REC + Umfrage badges
- [ ] PollOverlayPanel renders bars in StreamCockpit when poll active
- [ ] korczewski + mentolder both load `/admin/live` without errors

## Notes

- Wave-execution via subagent fan-out (per user's autonomy + fan-out workflow). 4 surprise auto-commits sweepingly captured unrelated `tickets/pr5` WIP that was stashed at session start; those 4 commits live on this branch but don't conflict with cockpit code.
- Phase 12.1 (authenticated E2E) deferred — basic redirect tests + cockpit-loads-without-crash are in.
- Phase 10.1 stretch (next-30-min calendar nudge) — schedule.nextEvent always returns null in v1; component renders nothing in that case.

Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-live-cockpit-design.md`
Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-08-live-cockpit.md`
